---
title: "resources"
title-block-banner: false
---

*Coming soon — a curated collection of tools, datasets, and references for systems neuroscience and neural data analysis.*

<!--
Possible sections:
- Analysis tools (Kilosort, DeepLabCut, etc.)
- Data repositories (DANDI Archive, OpenNeuro)
- Data standards (NWB tutorials)
- My analysis pipelines and code
- Useful references and textbooks
-->
